info.title: dms-backend
info.description:
## Document Management System (DMS) Backend

REST API for uploading, versioning, reviewing, and approving documents.  Includes RAG-powered semantic search and Q&A, AI-driven runbook generation, and role-based access control.

### Authentication

Most endpoints require a JWT **Bearer** token obtained from `POST /api/v1/auth/login`.  Include the token in the `Authorization` header:

    Authorization: Bearer <your_token>

### Error Responses

All error responses follow the same structure:

```json
{"detail": "Human-readable message", "code": "machine_readable_code", "request_id": "uuid"}
```

### Pagination

List endpoints return paginated results with `page`, `page_size`, and `total` fields.

post.description: Creates a new user with the default 'user' role.  The username must be unique across the system.  Returns the new user's profile, roles, and resolved permissions.

201.description: The newly created user profile with default roles and permissions

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

post.summary: Exchange credentials for a JWT access token
post.description: Authenticates the user with username and password.  Returns a signed JWT that must be included as an `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header on subsequent requests.

200.description: JWT bearer token with expiry details

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

get.summary: Get current user profile and permissions
get.description: Returns the authenticated user's identity, assigned roles, and resolved permission keys.  Use this to introspect the current session and discover what actions are allowed.

200.description: Authenticated user's identity, roles, and permission keys

post.description: Creates a new user with the specified roles.  Requires admin-level permissions.  The username must be unique.

post.description:
Upload a document file to the system.  The file is stored in object storage (Google Cloud Storage) and metadata is recorded in the database.

**Supported formats**: PDF, DOCX, TXT, and common image formats.

- `title` and `description` are optional — title defaults to the original filename.
- `document_type` defaults to `other` if not specified.

201.description: Metadata for the newly uploaded document

413.description: Uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

404.description: The requested resource was not found

409.description: Resource conflict (e.g. duplicate username or invalid state transition)

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

get.description:
Returns a paginated, filterable list of documents scoped to the authenticated user's role-based visibility.

- **status_filter**: Restrict to documents in a specific lifecycle status.
- **document_type**: Filter by document category (policy, manual, report, other).
- **created_by**: Filter by the UUID of the document creator.
- **page** / **page_size**: Control pagination (max 100 per page).

200.description: Paginated list of document summaries

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

get.description: Returns full document metadata including its workflow history (who submitted, approved, or rejected it and when) and a time-limited presigned download URL for the file contents.

200.description: Full document details with download URL

post.summary: Approve a document and trigger RAG ingestion
post.description:
Approves a submitted document and triggers RAG Engine ingestion for semantic search.

- **Production** (ENVIRONMENT=production + CLOUD_TASKS_QUEUE_NAME set): Enqueues a Cloud Tasks task to ingest asynchronously and returns 200 immediately.
- **Local / dev**: Runs ingestion synchronously — RAG Engine handles parsing/chunking/embedding server-side, so the request completes in seconds.

If ingestion fails, the document remains approved and a 500 is returned.  The client can manually retry via `POST /api/v1/rag/{document_id}`.

200.description: The document's updated workflow status after approval

404.description: The requested resource was not found

409.description: Resource conflict (e.g. duplicate username or invalid state transition)

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

post.summary: Send a message to the RAG-powered DMS assistant
post.description:
Run one conversation turn with the RAG-powered assistant.  The agent automatically searches the vector store for relevant document chunks before composing an answer.

- If `session_id` is omitted a new session UUID is generated.
- Reuse the returned `session_id` in follow-up messages to maintain context.

200.description: The assistant's reply with the session identifier

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

post.summary: Bulk ingest multiple documents into RAG Engine
post.description:
Ingest multiple documents in a single request.

- **Production** (async Cloud Tasks): Each document is enqueued as an independent Cloud Tasks task.  Returns 202 Accepted immediately.
- **Local / dev**: Runs synchronously in-request.  Each document is processed in an isolated database transaction so a failure in one does not roll back prior successes.

schema.title: Response Bulk Ingest Route Api V1 Rag Bulk Post

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

404.description: The requested resource was not found

409.description: Resource conflict (e.g. duplicate username or invalid state transition)

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

post.summary: Ingest a single document into RAG Engine
post.description:
Ingest a single approved document for semantic search and RAG.

- **Production** (async Cloud Tasks): Enqueues a Cloud Tasks task and returns 202 Accepted immediately.  The actual ingestion runs asynchronously via the worker endpoint.
- **Local / dev**: Runs synchronously and returns the full result.

Set ``force=true`` to re-ingest a document that has already been processed (required after changing the layout parser config).

schema.title: Response Ingest Document Route Api V1 Rag  Document Id  Post

post.summary: Generate a structured markdown runbook from vectorized documents
post.description:
Synthesises a markdown runbook from the specified set of documents using a specific purpose template.  The purpose drives the structure and tone of the generated output.

Supported purposes: onboarding, incident_response, deployment, troubleshooting, training, and other.

**Requires authentication** (any authenticated user can use this endpoint).

201.description: The generated runbook with full content

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

404.description: The requested resource was not found

409.description: Resource conflict (e.g. duplicate username or invalid state transition)

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

get.description: Returns a paginated list of runbooks generated by the authenticated user.  Results are scoped to the requesting user for privacy.

200.description: Paginated list of runbook summaries

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

get.description: Returns the full content and metadata of a specific runbook by its UUID.  Includes the generated markdown content and the list of source documents.

200.description: Full runbook with generated content

404.description: Runbook not found

400.description: Bad request — malformed input or missing required fields

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

422.description: Request body or parameters failed validation

delete.description: Permanently deletes a runbook from the database.  The generated content is removed and cannot be recovered.

200.description: Confirmation that the runbook was deleted

404.description: The requested resource was not found

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission

422.description: Validation Error

get.description: Returns 200 OK to indicate the service process is running.  Does **not** verify database connectivity — use `/ready` for that purpose.  Intended for container orchestrators and load balancer health checks.

200.description: Service is alive

get.description: Verifies that both the synchronous (write-path) and asynchronous (chat-path) database connections are reachable.  Returns 503 if either is down.  Intended for load balancer readiness checks and container orchestration startup probes.

200.description: All dependencies are reachable

503.description: A dependent service (database, vector store) is temporarily unavailable

Status.title: Status
Status.description:
Document lifecycle status.

Transitions are enforced by the application service layer:

- **DRAFT** → PENDING_REVIEW (on submit)
- **PENDING_REVIEW** → APPROVED | REJECTED (on reviewer action)
- **APPROVED** → EXPIRED (on expiry)
- Any → ARCHIVED (on soft-delete)

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /api/v1/auth/login.  Prefix the token value with nothing — just the raw JWT string.

tags.name: system
tags.description: Health and readiness probes for load balancers and container orchestrators.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: User registration, login, and session introspection. Public endpoints that do not require prior authentication.

tags.name: admin
tags.description: User and role management.  **Requires admin-level permissions.**

tags.name: documents
tags.description: Document upload, metadata management, versioning, and approval workflow. All endpoints require authentication and role-based permissions.

tags.name: approvals
tags.description: Pending-approval queue for reviewers and approvers.

tags.name: reviews
tags.description: Document reviews with numeric grading and written feedback.

tags.name: qa
tags.description: RAG-powered conversational Q&A.  Send a message and the assistant searches vectorized documents to compose an answer.

tags.name: rag
tags.description: RAG ingestion and retrieval via Vertex AI RAG Engine. In production, ingestion tasks are enqueued via Cloud Tasks and processed asynchronously.

tags.name: runbooks
tags.description: AI-generated structured markdown runbooks synthesised from collections of vectorized documents.
